title: cyperus fusciformis
intro: Cyperus fusciformis, also known as the yellow papyrus or dwarf umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus fusciformis include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and other medicinal concoctions.
